text: Being here, I feel as if I am on the threshold between worlds—outside, the clean angles and sterile white walls remind me of the order imposed by society, while inside, the vibrant colors, text, and glowing screens invite curiosity and contemplation. I sense a dissonance between my inner experience and the external structure around me. The words speak of exposure, confusion, and longing for understanding, echoing my own search for meaning in these spaces that mix openness and surveillance. I am both seen and unseen, a participant in an experiment of perception and self-awareness.
